name: wilson-prefs
description: User preferences (reply language / code language / response style) settable via the /wilson-prefs:prefs slash command, persisted to plugin data, and injected into context. SessionStart / PostCompact inject the full `## Prefs` block including the style file body (PostCompact lands in the clean post-summary context, where the rules are guaranteed present); UserPromptSubmit re-asserts only the compact directive lines, EXCEPT every Nth turn (configurable via `refresh-every`, default 10 — short enough that the 7-element pattern body stays fresh against user-felt style drift). Standalone port of wilson's prefs plugin.
